title: Pediatrics * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Pediatrics * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OHSU CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER EUGENE CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF OHSU Child Development and Rehabilitation Center provides a full range of clinical services for children with developmental disabilities or other special health care needs. Specialists and clinical services are available in child development, feeding and swallowing disorders, pediatric psychology, and communication disorders including speech therapy. Specialized pediatric diagnostic and treatment services for brain anomalies and spina bifida. Additional treatment may be available through OHSU outreach clinics. 74B Centennial Loop Suite 100 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (541) 346-1640 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER PORTLAND CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full range of clinical services for children with developmental disabilities or other special health care needs. Specialists and clinical services are available in autism, pediatric psychology and behavioral treatment, child development, cleft lip and palate, developmental evaluation, feeding and swallowing disorders, and communication disorders including speech therapy. Specialized pediatric diagnostic and treatment services for brain anomalies, hemophilia, spina bifida, and down syndrome. 700 SW Campus Drive Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (503) 494-8362 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER OHSU CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER
